next_steps: Perform serum and urine immunofixation electrophoresis with free light chains
Refer for cardiac magnetic resonance imaging with T1 and T2 mapping and extracellular volume quantification
Consider endomyocardial biopsy if non-invasive workup is inconclusive
Genetic testing for TTR gene mutation
Consult cardiology-electrophysiology for evaluation of atrial and ventricular arrhythmias
